name: LinkedIn: Open Post
summary: Open a single LinkedIn post/activity permalink read-only and return the main post (author, text, counts) plus up to 10 visible comments.
description: Open a LinkedIn post or activity permalink (e.g. /posts/...-activity-... or /feed/update/urn:li:activity:.../) in the existing session and return the top post card plus up to 10 visible comments. The main post carries author, author URL, body text, and reaction/comment/repost counts; comments are a flat array of { author, text }. Read-only: never likes, comments, reposts, or connects. Use linkedin_feed_digest for the home-feed timeline.

url.description: A LinkedIn post/activity permalink, e.g. https://www.linkedin.com/posts/<slug>-activity-<id>-<hash> or https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:activity:<id>/.

steps.name: Open the LinkedIn post permalink in the existing session
Allow the post page to hydrate
Extract the main post and its visible comments

help.summary: Open a single LinkedIn post/activity permalink read-only and return the main post plus up to 10 visible comments.

examples.description: Return the post body, counts, and up to 10 visible comments.

returns: { url, author, author_url, text, reactions, comments_count, reposts, comments[] } where comments is up to 10 { author, text } objects.
notes: Read-only. Never likes, comments, reposts, or connects.
Requires an existing logged-in LinkedIn session.
Only comments already rendered on the page are returned (cap 10); the workflow does not click to load more.
Counts are strings and default to "0" when not visible.
